mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game_character_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ascension_level DESC, floor_reached DESC, score DESC
SELECT * FROM game_character_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_character_record (user_id, class_id, class_name, ascension_level, act_reached, floor_reached, score, key_relic, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{classId}, #{className}, #{ascensionLevel}, #{actReached}, #{floorReached}, #{score}, #{keyRelic}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE game_character_record SET class_name = #{className}, ascension_level = #{ascensionLevel}, act_reached = #{actReached}, floor_reached = #{floorReached}, score = #{score}, key_relic = #{keyRelic}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM game_character_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
